args: const path = require('node:path'); const os = require('node:os'); const { pathToFileURL } = require('node:url'); const home = process.env.COPILOT_HOME || path.join(os.homedir(), '.copilot'); const entry = path.join(home, 'installed-plugins', 'copilot-council-review', 'copilot-council-review', 'servers', 'council-mcp.mjs'); import(pathToFileURL(entry).href).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });
